title: Cold Start Mitigation for Serverless LLMs

questions.question: Roughly how long does a cold start typically take for a 70B model on a fresh node without mitigations?
questions.question_zh: 在不做任何缓解措施的情况下，70B 模型在全新节点上典型的冷启动大约需要多久？

questions.question: Which AWS-side feature does the lesson recommend for pre-seeding container images so step-2 image pull disappears?
questions.question_zh: 本课推荐用 AWS 侧的哪个特性来预置容器镜像，让第二步的 image pull 消失？
options: Bottlerocket dual-volume architecture referenced from EC2NodeClass
options_zh: 在 EC2NodeClass 中引用的 Bottlerocket 双卷架构

questions.question: Which Modal feature provides the closest thing to a "warm GPU boot in seconds" by deserializing post-load state directly into HBM?
questions.question_zh: Modal 的哪个特性最接近 “数秒内热启 GPU”，能把加载完成后的状态直接反序列化到 HBM？
options_zh: NVMe 到 DRAM 的分级加载

questions.question: Why does live migration transfer input tokens rather than KV cache between nodes?
questions.question_zh: 节点间热迁移为什么传输输入 token 而不是 KV cache？
options: Live migration is required by GDPR
KV cache is encrypted and cannot move
Recomputing KV on the destination is cheaper than transferring GB of KV cache over the network
options_zh: 热迁移是 GDPR 要求
KV cache 是加密的，无法迁移
在目标节点上重新计算 KV，比通过网络传输几 GB 的 KV cache 更便宜

questions.question: Which serverless layer trades direct GPU cost for predictable readiness by keeping at least one replica live?
questions.question_zh: 哪一层 serverless 方案通过保留至少一个常驻副本，用直接的 GPU 成本换取可预期的就绪时间？

questions.question: Why does the lesson say cold-start mitigation must be stacked across layers rather than picked as a single tool?
questions.question_zh: 本课为什么强调冷启动缓解必须分层叠加，而不是只挑一个工具？
options: No single layer eliminates every step (node provision, image pull, weights load, engine init); stacking layers compresses each step
All five layers are bundled in vLLM
options_zh: 没有任何单一层能消除所有环节（节点开通、image pull、权重加载、引擎初始化）；叠加多层才能逐步压缩每个环节
vLLM 已经把五层全部打包进去了
